project_info.name: Fake News Detector Pro
project_info.description: Advanced AI-powered fake news detection system using machine learning and natural language processing to combat misinformation.
project_info.mission: To combat the spread of misinformation and promote media literacy through advanced technology and education.
project_info.vision: A world where people can trust the information they consume, supported by transparent and accountable AI systems.

milestones.title: Project Inception
milestones.description: Initial research and development began with focus on machine learning approaches to fake news detection.

milestones.title: First Prototype
milestones.description: Completed initial ML model with basic fake news detection capabilities using traditional ML algorithms.

milestones.title: Beta Launch
milestones.description: Released beta version with web interface and API for public testing and feedback collection.

milestones.title: Version 1.0 Release
milestones.description: Official launch of Fake News Detector with improved accuracy and user interface.

milestones.title: Partnership with Media Organizations
milestones.description: Established partnerships with leading news organizations for data sharing and validation.

milestones.title: Version 2.0 Major Update
milestones.description: Released major update with advanced NLP models, real-time analysis, and enhanced user features.

milestones.title: Mobile App Launch
milestones.description: Launched mobile applications for iOS and Android platforms.

milestones.title: 1 Million Analyses Milestone
milestones.description: Reached milestone of processing 1 million news articles for fake news detection.

achievements.detail: Consistently achieving over 95% accuracy across diverse news categories
Processed over 1 million news articles since launch
Reliable service availability around the clock
Fast analysis results for immediate feedback

research_publications.title: Advanced Fake News Detection Using Ensemble Learning
Natural Language Processing for Misinformation Detection
User Feedback Integration in AI Fact-Checking Systems

awards_recognitions.description: Recognized for responsible AI development practices
Honored for groundbreaking work in media verification
Awarded for technological innovation in automated fact-checking

impact_stats.users_educated: Over 50K users trained in media literacy
